lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [whispering] The meeting starts in two minutes and I forgot to prep the slides.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Yes. [panicking] There are twelve charts and I've done zero of them.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: Send them your last deck. Same charts, just change the date.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [dryly] I know. You owe me lunch.
